summary: Iteration 148 - Frontend testing for tab reordering, sidebar navigation, and dashboard numbers. Fixed critical bug in HouseholdBudget component (missing embedded prop). All 8 features verified successfully.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED - Component was missing 'embedded' prop causing ReferenceError when loaded in UnifiedClientOverview Budget tab

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 - charts still render but may have initial sizing issues

critical_code_review_comments: UnifiedClientOverview tab order is correct: Overview, Actions, Retirement, Investments, Budget, Tax Centre, Profile
UnifiedInvestments TABS array has Rebalancing at index 1 (after Overview) - verified in code and UI
Personal mode sidebar Settings does NOT contain Import/Export - verified
Adviser mode sidebar CRM section DOES contain Import/Export - verified
Dashboard numbers match: Net Worth $1,608,800, Gross Assets $2,278,000, Liabilities $669,200 - verified
Adviser mode sidebar order is correct: Dashboard, CRM, AI & Tasks, Execution, Compliance, Integrations, Tools
seed_data_creation: None - used existing thompson_family client data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 features verified. HouseholdBudget component was fixed (added embedded prop). To test Unified Client Overview tabs, set localStorage: app_mode='adviser' and selected_client=JSON with id 'thompson_family', then navigate to /dashboard. Adviser sidebar shows full nav when no client selected, shows client context nav when client is selected.

unified_client_overview_tab_order.details: Tab order verified: Overview, Actions, Retirement, Investments, Budget, Tax Centre, Profile (7 tabs in correct order)

budget_tab_loads_household_budget.details: HouseholdBudget component now loads correctly in Budget tab after adding missing 'embedded' prop

investments_rebalancing_position.details: Rebalancing tab is at position 2 (after Overview) in UnifiedInvestments TABS array

personal_mode_no_import_export.details: Personal mode sidebar Settings section does NOT contain Import/Export

adviser_mode_has_import_export.details: Adviser mode sidebar CRM section contains Import/Export link

dashboard_numbers_match.details: Net Worth $1,608,800, Gross Assets $2,278,000, Liabilities $669,200 - all values match expected

sidebar_collapsible_groups.details: Sidebar groups are collapsible with chevron indicators

adviser_sidebar_order.details: Adviser mode sidebar order: Dashboard, CRM, AI & Tasks, Execution, Compliance, Integrations, Tools

bug_fixed.issue: Component function signature was 'const HouseholdBudget = () =>' but used 'embedded' variable in return statement
bug_fixed.fix: Changed to 'const HouseholdBudget = ({ embedded = false }) =>' to accept embedded prop with default value

mocked_apis_list: Client profile data - thompson_family mock data
